column1: # cohort_month: Cohort month (YYYY-MM) | icp: ICP segment name | source: Acquisition source (or "all") | cohort_size: Number of users in cohort | day1_retained: % retained at day 1 | day3_retained: % retained at day 3 | day7_retained: % retained at day 7 | day14_retained: % retained at day 14 | day30_retained: % retained at day 30 | day60_retained: % retained at day 60 | day90_retained: % retained at day 90 | avg_key_actions_d7: Avg key actions completed in first 7 days | avg_engagement_score_d30: Avg engagement score at day 30 | pct_activated: % who completed activation milestone | pct_core_action_completed: % who completed core product action
